p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or map[T0, T1](x0, x1) = List.nil[T1] }[T, U](List.nil[T], lib(functions).identity_fn[T -> U](f))

function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0 -> T1) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or List.cons[T1](x3(x0), map[T0, T1](x1, x3)) = map[T0, T1](x2, x3) }[T, U](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), f)
function[T0, T1](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or x0.map(x1) = List.nil[T1] }[T, U](List.nil[T], lib(functions).identity_fn[T -> U](f))
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0 -> T1) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or List.cons[T1](x3(x0), x1.map(x3)) = x2.map(x3) }[T, U](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), f)
